children.heading: State appraiser certifying and licensing agency
children.label: 1 State appraiser certifying and licensing agency
children.text: The term “State appraiser certifying and licensing agency” means a State agency established in compliance with this chapter.

children.heading: Appraisal Subcommittee; subcommittee
children.label: 2 Appraisal Subcommittee; subcommittee
children.text: The terms “Appraisal Subcommittee” and “subcommittee” mean the Appraisal Subcommittee of the Federal Financial Institutions Examination Council.

children.heading: Council
children.label: 3 Council
children.text: The term “Council” means the Federal Financial Institutions Examinations Council.

children.label: A
children.text: a federal financial institutions regulatory agency or the Resolution Trust Corporation engages in, contracts for, or regulates; and

children.label: B
children.text: requires the services of an appraiser.

children.label: A
children.text: the sale, lease, purchase, investment in or exchange of real property, including interests in property, or the financing thereof;

children.label: B
children.text: the refinancing of real property or interests in real property; and

children.label: C
children.text: the use of real property or interests in property as security for a loan or investment, including mortgage-backed securities.

children.heading: Federal financial institutions regulatory agencies
children.label: 6 Federal financial institutions regulatory agencies
children.text: The term “Federal financial institutions regulatory agencies” means the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System, the Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation, the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency, the Office of Thrift Supervision, and the National Credit Union Administration.

children.heading: Financial institution
children.label: 7 Financial institution
children.text: The term “financial institution” means an insured depository institution as defined in or an insured credit union as defined in .section 1813 of this titlesection 1752 of this title

children.heading: Chairperson
children.label: 8 Chairperson
children.text: The term “Chairperson” means the Chairperson of the Appraisal Subcommittee selected by the Council.

children.heading: Foundation
children.label: 9 Foundation
children.text: The terms “Appraisal Foundation” and “Foundation” means the Appraisal Foundation established on , as a not for profit corporation under the laws of Illinois.November 30, 1987

children.heading: Written appraisal
children.label: 10 Written appraisal
children.text: The term “written appraisal” means a written statement used in connection with a federally related transaction that is independently and impartially prepared by a licensed or certified appraiser setting forth an opinion of defined value of an adequately described property as of a specific date, supported by presentation and analysis of relevant market information.

children.label: A
children.text: to recruit, select, and retain appraisers;

children.label: B
children.text: to contract with licensed and certified appraisers to perform appraisal assignments;

children.label: C
children.text: to manage the process of having an appraisal performed, including providing administrative duties such as receiving appraisal orders and appraisal reports, submitting completed appraisal reports to creditors and underwriters, collecting fees from creditors and underwriters for services provided, and reimbursing appraisers for services performed; or

children.label: D
children.text: to review and verify the work of appraisers.
